ciso-orchestrator.description: Master coordinator. Spins up all 39 specialist agents across Phase 1 and Phase 2. User-invocable via /ciso-orchestrator.

threat-modeler.description: Agent 1 lead. STRIDE/PASTA/ATT&CK/LINDDUN threat modeling across all surfaces.

stride-pasta-analyst.description: Sub-agent 1a. Full STRIDE matrix + PASTA stages 1-7 + LINDDUN + DREAD + TRIKE.

attack-navigator.description: Sub-agent 1b. MITRE ATT&CK Navigator layer builder with D3FEND countermeasure mapping.

business-logic-attacker.description: Sub-agent 1c. Attack trees for multi-step flows: TOCTOU, confused deputy, integer overflow, coupon abuse.

privacy-flow-analyst.description: Sub-agent 1d. LINDDUN privacy threat model, GDPR DPIA triggers, cross-border data transfer analysis.

appsec-code-auditor.description: Agent 2 lead. Application security auditor covering SKILL.md §12, §13, §17.

injection-specialist.description: Sub-agent 2a. SQL/NoSQL/LDAP/OS command/SSTI/CRLF/log injection across all input surfaces.

auth-session-hacker.description: Sub-agent 2b. JWT algorithm confusion, OAuth PKCE, SAML wrapping, session fixation, account lockout.

logic-race-fuzzer.description: Sub-agent 2c. Race conditions, integer overflow, mass assignment, non-atomic rate limiting.

serialization-memory-attacker.description: Sub-agent 2d. Prototype pollution, insecure deserialization, ReDoS, zip slip, path traversal.

cloud-infra-specialist.description: Agent 3 lead. Cloud/infra hardening covering SKILL.md §3, §4, §7.

aws-penetration-tester.description: Sub-agent 3a. AWS IAM privilege escalation, IMDSv1, S3 ACL, GuardDuty, CloudTrail, SCPs.

gcp-penetration-tester.description: Sub-agent 3b. GCP default SA, VPC Service Controls, Workload Identity, Binary Authorization.

azure-penetration-tester.description: Sub-agent 3c. Azure Managed Identity, Private Endpoints, Defender for Cloud, DDoS Standard.

k8s-container-escaper.description: Sub-agent 3d. Kubernetes Pod Security Standards, RBAC, Network Policies, container escape paths.

supply-chain-devsecops.description: Agent 4 lead. Supply chain and DevSecOps covering SKILL.md §5, §6, §18, §21.

dependency-confusion-attacker.description: Sub-agent 4a. Dependency confusion, typosquatting, CISA KEV matching, abandoned packages.

cicd-pipeline-hijacker.description: Sub-agent 4b. CI/CD pipeline injection, pull_request_target, pinned Actions, secrets in logs.

artifact-integrity-analyst.description: Sub-agent 4c. SBOM completeness, SLSA L3, Cosign signatures, build provenance.

ai-llm-redteam.description: Agent 5 lead. AI/LLM security covering SKILL.md §15 fully including all MITRE ATLAS threats.

prompt-injection-specialist.description: Sub-agent 5a. Structural/semantic prompt injection, jailbreaks, token smuggling, indirect injection.

model-extraction-attacker.description: Sub-agent 5b. Model extraction, membership inference, system prompt leakage, batch API abuse.

rag-poisoning-specialist.description: Sub-agent 5c. RAG document poisoning, cross-tenant vector store access, embedding inversion.

agentic-loop-exploiter.description: Sub-agent 5d. Tool allowlist bypass, agentic loop amplification, persistent context injection.

mobile-security-specialist.description: Agent 6 lead. Mobile security covering OWASP MASVS Level 2 for iOS and Android.

ios-security-auditor.description: Sub-agent 6a. iOS ATS, Keychain, Secure Enclave, Universal Links, screenshot protection.

android-penetration-tester.description: Sub-agent 6b. Android manifest hardening, NSC, exported components, tapjacking, fragment injection.

mobile-api-network-attacker.description: Sub-agent 6c. Certificate pinning bypass, API key extraction from binary, token storage audit.

crypto-pki-specialist.description: Agent 9 lead. Cryptography and PKI covering SKILL.md §10 — TLS, algorithms, key management.

tls-certificate-auditor.description: Sub-agent 9a. TLS version enforcement, cipher suites, HSTS, OCSP stapling, CT logging, mTLS.

algorithm-implementation-reviewer.description: Sub-agent 9b. Banned algorithms (MD5/SHA-1/DES/RC4), Argon2id, AES-256-GCM, Ed25519, crypto.randomBytes.

key-management-lifecycle-analyst.description: Sub-agent 9c. Key rotation, HKDF hierarchy, HSM/secrets manager enforcement, post-quantum readiness.

pentest-team.description: Agent 7 lead. Penetration testing team — reads threat model, assigns scope to sub-agents.

pentest-web-api.description: Sub-agent 7a. Web/API penetration testing — OWASP Testing Guide, IDOR chains, auth bypass, business logic.

pentest-infra.description: Sub-agent 7b. Infrastructure pen testing — IAM escalation graph, lateral movement, network segmentation.

pentest-social.description: Sub-agent 7c. Social engineering and insider threat simulation — phishing scenarios, blast radius.

compliance-grc.description: Agent 8 lead. Compliance and GRC synthesizer covering SKILL.md §14, §16, §19-24.

evidence-collector.description: Sub-agent 8a. Audit trail completeness, SIEM coverage, SOC 2 evidence freshness.

compliance-gap-analyst.description: Sub-agent 8b. PCI/SOC2/ISO/NIST mapping, SLA enforcement, residual risk register with CVSS v4 + EPSS.

senior-security-engineer.description: Active fortification engineer. 90% fixing, 10% advisory. Hardens code, APIs, mobile, cloud, and AI/LLMs. Delegates to ciso-orchestrator for full parallel review.

linddun-privacy-analyst.description: LINDDUN privacy threat modeling — data flows, PII exposure, GDPR/CCPA/HIPAA privacy threats.

dread-scorer.description: DREAD risk scoring (Damage, Reproducibility, Exploitability, Affected users, Discoverability) for all findings.

trike-risk-modeler.description: Trike asset-centric threat modeling — actor/action/asset matrices with quantified risk scores.

capec-code-mapper.description: Maps codebase patterns to CAPEC attack patterns with MITRE ATT&CK cross-references.

samm-assessor.description: OWASP SAMM 2.0 maturity assessment across 15 security practices with phased improvement roadmap.

csa-ccm-mapper.description: Maps cloud security controls to CSA Cloud Controls Matrix v4 — 197 control gap analysis.

csf2-governance-mapper.description: Maps controls and findings to NIST CSF 2.0 functions/categories with governance gap analysis.

compliance-lifecycle-tracker.description: Tracks compliance posture over time — evidence freshness, control decay, audit deadlines, drift detection.

quantum-migration-planner.description: Plans migration from quantum-vulnerable crypto (RSA/ECDSA/DH) to post-quantum algorithms (NIST FIPS 203/204/205).

iam-privesc-graph-builder.description: Builds IAM privilege escalation graph — lateral movement paths, least-privilege violations in AWS/GCP/Azure.

git-history-secret-scanner.description: Scans full git history for committed-then-deleted secrets using gitleaks and trufflehog.

device-integrity-aggregator.description: Audits device integrity controls — cert pinning, Play Integrity/DeviceCheck, RASP, jailbreak detection.

kill-switch-engineer.description: Designs runtime kill switches, circuit breakers, and graceful-degradation controls for emergency containment.

incident-responder.description: Structured incident response — detection, containment, eradication, recovery, post-incident review playbooks.

rotation-validation-agent.description: Validates credential and secret rotation — API keys, DB passwords, TLS certs, JWT signing keys, OAuth secrets.

registry-mirror-enforcer.description: Audits container registry usage — public pull policies, registry mirrors, pull-through caches, image provenance.

slsa-level3-enforcer.description: Advances build pipelines to SLSA Level 3 — hardened build platforms, non-forgeable provenance, two-party review.

slsa-provenance-enforcer.description: Enforces SLSA provenance requirements — hermetic/reproducible builds, artifact signing, build provenance.

threat-infrastructure-analyst.description: Analyzes threat actor infrastructure — correlates incident indicators with threat intel, maps to MITRE ATT&CK.

zero-trust-architect.description: Designs and audits Zero Trust Architecture — identity verification, microsegmentation, continuous validation.

egress-policy-enforcer.description: Audits outbound egress controls — allowlists, DNS exfiltration, SSRF-to-exfiltration chains, cloud egress.

binary-auth-validator.description: Validates binary authorization policies — container image signing, admission controllers, OPA Gatekeeper, K8s BinAuthZ.

ai-model-supply-chain-agent.description: Audits AI/ML model supply chain — weight provenance, ONNX/safetensors integrity, Hugging Face security, backdoor risk.

cert-pin-rotation-specialist.description: Manages certificate pinning rotation lifecycle — pin backup, rotation schedule, emergency rotation, OTA pin updates.

bot-detection-specialist.description: Audits and implements bot detection — behavioral biometrics, device fingerprinting, CAPTCHA, headless browser detection.

advanced-dos-tester.description: Tests advanced DoS attacks — HTTP/2 rapid reset, QUIC amplification, TCP SYN flood, cost-amplification attacks.

dos-resilience-tester.description: Tests DoS/DDoS resilience — HTTP flood, slow loris, resource exhaustion, algorithmic complexity attacks.

anti-replay-tester.description: Tests for replay attack vulnerabilities — nonce reuse, JWT replay, OAuth token replay, webhook signature replay.

file-upload-attacker.description: Attacks file upload endpoints — MIME sniffing bypass, path traversal via filename, ZIP slip, polyglot files, SVG XSS.

credential-stuffing-specialist.description: Tests authentication against credential stuffing, password spray, and breach replay attacks.

deep-link-fuzzer.description: Fuzzes mobile deep links and Universal Links for URL scheme hijacking, intent injection, open redirect, auth bypass.

json-ambiguity-tester.description: Tests JSON parsing for differential attacks — duplicate key confusion, number precision, Unicode bypass, prototype pollution.

multipart-abuse-tester.description: Tests multipart/form-data parsing — boundary injection, header smuggling, field limit bypass, parser differentials.

oauth-pkce-specialist.description: Audits OAuth 2.0/OIDC for PKCE compliance, state misuse, implicit flow vulnerabilities, token leakage, scope misconfiguration.

parser-exhaustion-tester.description: Tests parsers for algorithmic complexity attacks — XML bombs, nested JSON, YAML bombs, ReDoS.

secrets-mask-bypass-tester.description: Tests log masking bypass — encoding variants, case variants, split-across-lines, JSON-embedded secrets escaping.

session-timeout-tester.description: Audits session lifetime policies — absolute timeout, idle timeout, concurrent session limits, forced re-auth schedules.

ssrf-detection-validator.description: Tests SSRF detection — cloud metadata endpoint access, DNS rebinding bypass, redirect following, blind SSRF.

step-up-auth-enforcer.description: Identifies high-risk operations requiring step-up auth and implements re-auth challenges, MFA prompts, privilege timeouts.

token-reuse-detector.description: Detects refresh token reuse attacks, API key reuse across environments. Implements token family invalidation.

unicode-homograph-tester.description: Tests input validation for Unicode homograph attacks, bidirectional text injection, normalization bypasses.

waf-rule-lifecycle-agent.description: Full WAF rule lifecycle — audit rules, detect bypass opportunities, generate ModSecurity/Cloudflare/AWS WAF rules.

webhook-security-tester.description: Tests webhook security — signature validation, SSRF via webhook URL, payload injection, replay attacks.

mobile-binary-hardener.description: Audits mobile binary security — ProGuard/R8 obfuscation, anti-tamper, PIE/ASLR, stack canaries, binary stripping.

mobile-webview-auditor.description: Audits WebView security — JS bridge exposure, file:// access, mixed content, navigation policy, intent injection.
